title: helichrysum drakensbergense
intro: Helichrysum drakensbergense, also known as the Drakensberg paper flower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Drakensberg Mountains in South Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Helichrysum drakensbergense include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Helichrysum drakensbergense can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
